title: Groups and Raise modules enter the test phase
content_html:
It has been quieter on the channels recently because the team has been focused on getting the next modules ready.

Groups and Raise are now in the test phase. If you would like to help, join the Test group on Telegram, try the modules, and share what you find. Direct feedback from this stage shapes the final release.

Thanks to everyone who is testing and reporting back.
author: Cryptool
